description: This pipeline performs a complex image processing task that involves multiple steps, including data annotation, filtering, transformation, and analysis. It starts by applying various operations to the input images, such as thresholding, blurring, and calibration, to enhance and standardize the data. The processed images are then used to generate 3D ROI lists, which are further analyzed to extract statistics and measurements. The pipeline also involves overlaying and combining different image channels, as well as converting label images to ROI lists. Additionally, it performs Z-projections, dimension equalization, and other spatial operations to prepare the data for downstream analysis. The ultimate goal of the pipeline appears to be the generation of annotated data and statistical measurements from the input images, which can be used for further scientific analysis and interpretation.

dc48f818-a1ff-4ef5-bd6e-3c903de63840.name: annotate-data-with-table-values
dc48f818-a1ff-4ef5-bd6e-3c903de63840.description:
Annotates the incoming data with values from the input table

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

32342ea1-d153-4bb2-99fd-7c95f291df59.name: ij1-dimensions-expression-slicer
32342ea1-d153-4bb2-99fd-7c95f291df59.description: Uses expressions to create custom stacks. There are three expressions, one for each Z, channel and frame plane that return numeric indices of slices that should be generated. You can optionally enable to iterate over all incoming slices of the image to generate multiple stacks. If no iteration is enabled (default), each expression is only executed for z=0,c=0,t=0.

68dd34f2-a23c-4639-be8d-f7bfa1baa1f8.name: ij3d-measure-roi3d
68dd34f2-a23c-4639-be8d-f7bfa1baa1f8.description:
Generates a results table containing 3D ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, NaN is returned.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

2d0960fa-3547-4cdd-9446-0c99c8dd595d.name: ij1-math-fast-image-arithmetics
2d0960fa-3547-4cdd-9446-0c99c8dd595d.description:
Applies standard arithmetic and logical operations including, addition, subtraction, division, multiplication, GAMMA, EXP, LOG, SQR, SQRT, ABS, AND, OR, XOR, minimum, maximum, and more.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f38d555e-c87e-42c5-9ca1-1ad2d51f6938.name: ij3d-measure-roi3d
f38d555e-c87e-42c5-9ca1-1ad2d51f6938.description:
Generates a results table containing 3D ROI statistics. If a reference image is provided, the statistics are calculated for the reference image. Otherwise, NaN is returned.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

5bd2d21c-05a2-4476-a803-89e0f740b4f1.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
5bd2d21c-05a2-4476-a803-89e0f740b4f1.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

8398880e-fa5b-4473-8bba-6006df02eacf.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
8398880e-fa5b-4473-8bba-6006df02eacf.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

92c3e78f-fa19-4c6b-8e9f-0a5e4f28e271.name: ij1-dimensions-zproject-2
92c3e78f-fa19-4c6b-8e9f-0a5e4f28e271.description: Performs a Z-Projection. Also supports other axes C-Project/T-Project.

f8f07d4a-6324-42be-8502-4099eebcaba6.name: ij1-math-fast-image-arithmetics
f8f07d4a-6324-42be-8502-4099eebcaba6.description:
Applies standard arithmetic and logical operations including, addition, subtraction, division, multiplication, GAMMA, EXP, LOG, SQR, SQRT, ABS, AND, OR, XOR, minimum, maximum, and more.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f37ac6c3-6a51-4d61-8ff6-533245cd7e98.name: ij1-dimensions-expression-slicer
f37ac6c3-6a51-4d61-8ff6-533245cd7e98.description: Uses expressions to create custom stacks. There are three expressions, one for each Z, channel and frame plane that return numeric indices of slices that should be generated. You can optionally enable to iterate over all incoming slices of the image to generate multiple stacks. If no iteration is enabled (default), each expression is only executed for z=0,c=0,t=0.

64a9bfab-aabd-4ba5-8985-a7dbc704b0e5.name: ij1-transform-equalize-dimensions
64a9bfab-aabd-4ba5-8985-a7dbc704b0e5.description:
Makes the input image have the same dimensions as the reference image. You can choose to make them equal in width/height, and hyperstack dimensions (Z, C, T)

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f15d4406-c319-4136-86ff-2a0d477cee87.name: ij3d-roi-filter-by-overlap
f15d4406-c319-4136-86ff-2a0d477cee87.description:
Filters the 3D ROI lists by testing for mutual overlap. The ROI1 output contains all ROI1 input ROI that overlap with any of ROI2. The ROI2 output contains all ROI2 input ROI that overlap with a ROI1 ROI.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

57ecfe51-817e-4ee7-b472-3e5c24eadbca.name: ij3d-roi-convert-to-rgb
57ecfe51-817e-4ee7-b472-3e5c24eadbca.description:
Converts 3D ROI lists to a label image. Depending on the number of objects, an 8-bit, 16-bit, or 32-bit label image is generated.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f6283caf-b4e9-4c23-8eff-fef72d0dc2be.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
f6283caf-b4e9-4c23-8eff-fef72d0dc2be.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

16153347-9053-4e19-8119-9fc5231a1b8d.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
16153347-9053-4e19-8119-9fc5231a1b8d.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

68696860-2191-402f-b8f3-ea34be0ae365.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
68696860-2191-402f-b8f3-ea34be0ae365.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

242adff0-f18b-4300-9c1a-1350752e0dc3.description: Performs a Z-Projection. Also supports other axes C-Project/T-Project.

5bc7b811-0217-4d99-9a7e-697d4a18844b.name: ij1-color-blend-images
5bc7b811-0217-4d99-9a7e-697d4a18844b.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a9368afa-d65e-4497-b11e-eefa5e843161.name: ij1-transform-equalize-dimensions
a9368afa-d65e-4497-b11e-eefa5e843161.description:

993c6850-6646-4624-ac40-dfa83e22fe24.name: ij1-calibration-copy-physical-dimensions
993c6850-6646-4624-ac40-dfa83e22fe24.description:
Copies the phyiscal pixel sizes from the source to the target

c6b94702-a848-4bf1-a08d-65ddd06189c1.name: ij3d-labels-to-roi
c6b94702-a848-4bf1-a08d-65ddd06189c1.description: Converts a label image into 3D ROI

c1783b84-5c2d-42ff-9196-30b237b4fc11.name: ij1-generate-zero-image
c1783b84-5c2d-42ff-9196-30b237b4fc11.description: Creates a new image that is black.

ef9c716e-4a56-409a-8695-5809611f56ec.name: ij3d-roi-change-properties
ef9c716e-4a56-409a-8695-5809611f56ec.description: Sets the properties of all 3D ROI

8fb090a2-6cd2-4efd-9dd0-526d590677ff.name: ij1-binary-connected-component-labeling-3d
8fb090a2-6cd2-4efd-9dd0-526d590677ff.description: Applies a connected components labeling on a mask. Each connected component is assigned a unique value in the output label image. If the image is non-binary, the connected components are generated per-input value. If 3D data is supplied, the connected components are extracted in 3D.

d89219f9-440b-4377-a940-7ba9915db5d5.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
d89219f9-440b-4377-a940-7ba9915db5d5.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.
